subject: [PATCHv7 05/18] riscv/mm: Align vmemmap to maximal folio size

2026-02-27.patch_summary: This patch series introduces a change to align vmemmap to the maximal folio size, which is required for HugeTLB vmemmap optimization (HVO). The alignment ensures that struct pages of the head page are naturally aligned with regard to the folio size. This change affects the riscv architecture and involves modifications to the mmzone.h file.
